subcodes.first_line: This Wronged One, amidst the tumult of trials and tribulations, hath made mention and continueth to make mention of the loved ones of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم در بحبوحه بلایا و رزایا اولیای حق را ذکر نموده و مینماید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
